choices: Preview → read the list → live only if OK
Skip preview if CI is green
items.explain: Preview first, verify targets, then run live.

choices: Prints what Make would run without executing recipes
items.explain: Make’s -n is a dry-run: show recipes, do not run them.

items.prompt: A script’s --dry-run should print would-do lines instead of deleting.
items.explain: Dry-run previews side effects; live run performs them.

choices: Print the destructive command before running the real one
items.explain: echo rm … (or similar) lets you verify the command before pasting it live.
